card.name: Counterfeit Craftsman
card.text: Artifact spells you cast have manipulate. Whenever an artifact you own or an artifact token enters under an opponent's control, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Cut the Strings
card.text: Gain control of any number of target permanents you own. Draw a card.

card.name: Unanimous Assent
card.text: Machination — When each player votes for the same choice at least once. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn this conspiracy face up when the condition is met.) When you turn this conspiracy face up, draw a card for each opponent you have. Then each opponent draws a card.

card.name: Dissident Chef
card.text: Gift 3 life (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when this enters, they gain 3 life.) Dethrone (Whenever this creature attacks the player with the most life or tied for most life, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) When this creature enters, if the gift was promised, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Elusive Trespasser
card.text: Ward {1} This creature can't be blocked.

card.name: Tree of Alms
card.text: Gift a +1/+1 counter (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when this enters, they put a +1/+1 counter on a creature they control.) Defender, reach Whenever you give a gift, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Gilded Shackles
card.text: Enchant creature you don't control Enchanted creature can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated. Whenever enchanted creature gives acclaim, you and that creature's controller each draw a card.

card.name: Blueblood Connoisseur
card.text: Whenever another Noble you control dies, choose a kind of counter from among deathtouch, flying, lifelink, menace, and +1/+1. Put a counter of that kind on this creature.

card.name: The Court's Favor
card.text: Machination — If you control exactly three creatures. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn this conspiracy face up at any time as long as the condition is met.) When you turn this conspiracy face up, the next time you vote this turn, vote three additional times.

card.name: Voice of the People
card.text: (Start the game with this conspiracy face up in the command zone.) At the end of combat on your turn, if you're the monarch, choose an opponent. That player becomes the monarch and each other player draws a card.

card.name: Friends in High Places
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card and create a Bribe token. Whenever players finish voting, create a Bribe token for each opponent who voted for a choice you didn't vote for.

card.name: Neutral Negotiator
card.text: Manipulate You can't vote. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to this creature.

card.name: Hunter of the Proud
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent becomes the monarch. You can't become the monarch. Whenever this creature or a creature with dethrone attacks the monarch, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.

card.name: Paragon of Bounty
card.text: When this creature enters, you become the monarch. Whenever you give a gift to an opponent, if you're the monarch, you also receive that gift. (Copy that gift ability as though an opponent promised that gift to you.)

card.name: Eloquent Hieromancer
card.text: Will of the Council — When this creature enters, starting with you, each player votes for one of their opponents. If the vote is tied, you become the monarch. Otherwise, the player who gets the most votes becomes the monarch. Whenever you become the monarch, each player draws a card.

card.name: Decaying Queen
card.text: When this creature enters, you become the monarch. At the beginning of your end step, put a -1/-1 counter on this creature. Whenever the toll reaches its maximum, you may return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Fanciful Technocrat
card.text: When this creature enters, the player who controls more artifacts than any other player becomes the monarch. As long as you're the monarch, artifacts you control have "{T}: Tap or untap target nonland permanent an opponent controls."

card.name: Royal Gossipmonger
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent becomes the monarch and you create two 1/1 white Bird creature tokens with flying. The monarch plays with the top card of their library revealed. As long as you're the monarch, you may play lands and cast creature spells from the top of your library.

card.name: Twinblade Aspirants
card.text: Double strike When this creature enters, target opponent becomes the monarch. Whenever you become the monarch during combat, untap each creature you control that attacked this turn and put an acclaimed counter on them.

card.name: Grip of Madness
card.text: Choose one or both — • Destroy target goaded creature. • Destroy target creature with power 2 or less.

card.name: Outrage
card.text: Choose two — • Outrage deals 2 damage to any target. • Outrage deals 2 damage to the monarch. • Outrage deals 2 damage to each player with the most life or tied for most life.

card.name: Rites of Redemption
card.text: Council's Dilemma — When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, starting with you, each player votes for pledge or tribute. For each pledge vote, that player can't attack you during their next turn. For each tribute vote, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Twilight Anthem
card.text: Will of the Council — When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, starting with you, each opponent votes for dawn or dusk. If dawn gets more votes, creatures you control get +1/+1 until your next turn. If dusk gets more votes, creatures your opponents control get -1/-1 until your next turn. If the vote is tied, destroy all creatures and exile this enchantment.

card.name: Progress Unbound
card.text: Will of the Council — When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, starting with you, each player votes for innovation or iteration. If innovation gets more votes, you may put an artifact card from your hand onto the battlefield. If iteration gets more votes or the vote is tied, create a token that's a copy of target artifact you control.

card.name: Vicious Cycle
card.text: Will of the Council — When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, starting with you, each player votes for life or limb. If life gets more votes, you may return target permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield. If limb gets more votes or the vote is tied, each player sacrifices a nontoken permanent.

card.name: Faltering Devotion
card.text: Council's Dilemma — When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, starting with you, each player votes for faith or doubt. For each faith vote, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card for as long as it remains exiled. For each doubt vote, put a card you own in exile on the bottom of your library and create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Patterns of Perfection
card.text: Will of the Council — When this enchantment enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, starting with you, each player votes for 0, 1, 2, 3, or 5. Then put a permanent card with power, toughness, or mana value equal to the value with the most votes or tied for the most votes from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Cleansing Dawn
